description: Style NoteA perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Hawai flip flop comes with soft rubber straps and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to glide out of them.Product DetailsSoft rubber straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Cushioned textured PU footbed, with brand logo printed on the toe and heel regionTPR outsole with V-styled lugs with brand name embossed in it for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust
